comment.body: What i read from geo-analysts other than Alma makes peace/truce in Ukraine seem completely unlikely. There are high-ranking officials and even generals in or close to NATO who advise that Russia military forces have been weakened so much by the Ukraine war that Russia could be conquered within 3 days. NATO/Europe should do so rather sooner than later, and would find new prosperity with the help of Russian natural resources worth 75 trillion Euros and leave the rest of the world behind to build a Roman empire 2.0. All this against the backdrop of diverting from imminent sovereign wealth defaults that will otherwise cripple EU state after EU state and lead to the total and utter failure of EU and the Euro - which is ofc only discussed behind the curtain.

comment.body: All propaganda narrative. The truth is that for now Eu need the conflict in Ucraine to boost the heavy industry and the military industry. Go look who produces the scalp missiles that ukraine used to hit russia. MBDA. A joint venture industry between Italy, France, Uk. Also Germany needs to keep alive its heavy industry which is no longer competitive, they are taking their time because China, as Alma wrote, is exporting deflation exacerbating the economic stagnation.
